case_title: IVAN BEIKOVA et al VS. HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEMS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, BY COURT. "PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO FIRST FILE A GOVERNMENT CLAIM WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS NOT YET DONE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY EMILY ERDMAN--LEGAL INTERN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BEIKOVA, IVAN BEIKOVA, KRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BEIKOVA, IVAN BEIKOVA, KRISTINA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEMS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $150.00 SERVED JAN-27-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEALTH SERVICE SYSTEMS
